$schema: Archive Watch seed catalog. Produced by build-catalog.html (browser) or tools/build-catalog.mjs (future CLI). Shipped inside the tvOS app bundle and loaded by ios/Services/SeedCatalog.swift on first launch so the app has immediate content without hitting the network. The live EnrichmentService replaces / enriches these entries in the background. Regenerate when featured.json shelves change or when you want fresh popularity data.
